units.content: system maintains a vocabulary of language-independent numerical identifiers
each identifier carries a Boolean admissibility flag
flag distinguishes instrument mechanism identifiers from theoretical commitment or target assumption identifiers
system rejects at insertion time any identifier whose flag indicates theoretical commitment or target assumption
system maintains a plurality of inference steps
each inference step contains a claim descriptor, a convergence-status annotation, and a list of admissible operational-mechanism identifiers
inference steps are processed under a reading discipline
reading discipline does not admit any identifier flagged as theoretical commitment or target assumption
inference drawn from shared identifiers across distinct steps reflects shared instrument mechanism only
inference does not reflect shared theoretical framing
